instructions: Pick up the book from the table.
Grab the book off the counter and lift it.
Use your gripper to pick the book up from the surface.
Lift the book from the table and hold it.
Reach for the book on the table and pick it up.
Grasp the book and raise it off the table.
Take the book from the counter and hold it above the surface.
Pick the book up from the workspace.
Grab the book off the table and lift it clear of the surface.
Reach down, grasp the book, and raise it from the table.
